samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Serial input data accumulation output, input is 8bit data.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="IDLE">Idle state.</parameter>
        <parameter name="INPUT">Input state.</parameter>
        <parameter name="OUTPUT">Output state.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state" width_description="[1:0]">State register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="count" width_description="[1:0]">Count register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="sum" width_description="[9:0]">Sum register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <case_if condition="'state' changes">
                        <sequential>
                            <if>
                                <condition>"state == IDLE"</condition>
                                <then>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <if>
                                            <condition>"valid_in == 1"</condition>
                                            <then>
                                                <sequential>
                                                    <assign id="state" value="'INPUT'"/>
                                                    <assign id="count" value="'count' + 1"/>
                                                    <assign id="sum" value="'sum' + 'data_in'"/>
                                                </sequential>
                                            </then>
                                            <else>
                                                <sequential>
                                                    <assign id="state" value="'IDLE'"/>
                                                    <assign id="count" value="'count'"/>
                                                    <assign id="sum" value="'sum'"/>
                                                </sequential>
                                            </else>
                                        </if>
                                    </sequential>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <assign id="state" value="'state'"/>
                                        <assign id="count" value="'count'"/>
                                        <assign id="sum" value="'sum'"/>
                                    </sequential>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </sequential>
                    </case_if>
                    <case_if condition="'count' changes">
                        <sequential>
                            <if>
                                <condition>"count == 3"</condition>
                                <then>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <assign id="state" value="'OUTPUT'"/>
                                        <assign id="count" value="'count' + 1"/>
                                        <assign id="sum" value="'sum'"/>
                                    </sequential>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <assign id="state" value="'state'"/>
                                        <assign id="count" value="'count' + 1"/>
                                        <assign id="sum" value="'sum'"/>
                                    </sequential>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </sequential>
                    </case_if>
                    <case_if condition="'sum' changes">
                        <sequential>
                            <if>
                                <condition>"count == 3"</condition>
                                <then>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <assign id="state" value="'OUTPUT'"/>
                                        <assign id="count" value="'count' + 1"/>
                                        <assign id="sum" value="'sum'"/>
                                    </sequential>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <assign id="state" value="'state'"/>
                                        <assign id="count" value="'count'"/>
                                        <assign id="sum" value="'sum' + 'data_in'"/>
                                    </sequential>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </sequential>
                    </case_if>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
